resources.name: Forager RCM API
resources.description: Complete API collection for Forager RCM Backend

resources.name: Setup (first-time only)
resources.description: One-time setup. Creates the first org and admin user. Disabled after first use.

resources.name: Login
resources.description: Returns a JWT token. Copy the token value into the environment variable 'token'.

resources.name: Get My Profile
resources.description: Returns the currently authenticated user's profile.

resources.name: Register New User
resources.description: Roles: Admin, Biller, Provider, FrontDesk

resources.name: List Patients
resources.description: Optional filters: ?search=Jane&source=Forager&includeInsurances=true

resources.name: Create Patient
resources.description: dateOfBirth is a Unix timestamp. Convert at unixtimestamp.com

resources.name: List Visits
resources.description: Optional filters: ?patientId=&providerId=&status=Scheduled&dateFrom=1700000000&dateTo=1800000000

resources.name: Create Visit
resources.description: visitDate and visitTime are Unix timestamps. Status options: Scheduled, InProgress, Completed, Cancelled, NoShow

resources.name: List Claims
resources.description: Optional filters: ?status=Draft&patientId=&providerId=

resources.name: Create Claim
resources.description: totalCharge is in cents (25000 = $250.00). Status options: Draft, Submitted, Pending, Paid, Denied, Appealed, Void

resources.name: List CPT Codes
resources.description: Optional filter: ?search=99213

resources.name: Get CPT Code by Code
resources.description: Use the CPT code itself (e.g. 99213) as the ID, not a UUID

resources.name: Create CPT Code

body.text:
{
  "code": "99213",
  "description": "Office or other outpatient visit, established patient, low complexity",
  "category": "Evaluation and Management",
  "defaultFee": 15000,
  "organizationId": "{{ _.organization_id }}"
}

resources.description: defaultFee is in cents (15000 = $150.00)

resources.name: List Insurance Policies
resources.description: Optional filter: ?patientId=PATIENT_ID_HERE

resources.name: Create Insurance Policy
resources.description: priority: Primary, Secondary, Tertiary. Monetary values in cents.

resources.name: List Attachments
resources.description: Optional filters: ?patientId=&visitId=&claimId=

resources.name: Upload Attachment
resources.description: Use multipart/form-data. attachmentType options: ClinicalNote, EOB, InsuranceCard, LabResult, Referral, Other

resources.name: Health Check
resources.description: No auth required. Returns {status: 'ok'} if the server is running.

resources.name: Update Claim Status
resources.description: Valid statuses: Draft, Ready, Submitted, Accepted, Rejected, Paid, Denied, Appealed, Voided

resources.name: Submit Claim to Stedi (837P)
resources.description: Submits the claim as an 837P professional claim to Stedi. Claim must be in Ready or Draft status.

resources.name: Check Claim Status via Stedi (276/277)
resources.description: Real-time claim status check via Stedi 276/277 transaction.

resources.name: Run Eligibility Check
resources.description: Triggers a real-time 270/271 eligibility check via Stedi. patientInsuranceId required; visitId optional.

resources.name: Eligibility — Aetna Subscriber Only (AETNA9wcSu / John Doe)
resources.description:
Stedi sandbox test — Aetna subscriber only.
• No dateOfBirth on subscriber (omit it — Stedi flags real-looking dates as PII).
• NPI 1999999984 passes check-digit validation.
• Returns active medical coverage 271 response.
• tradingPartnerServiceId 60054 = Aetna sandbox.

resources.name: Eligibility — Aetna Dependent (AETNA9wcSu / Jordan Doe)
resources.description: Stedi sandbox — Aetna dependent. Jordan Doe (DOB 20010714) is John's child. Dependent info returned in dependents[] array.

resources.name: Eligibility — Aetna Subscriber Only (AETNA12345 / Jane Doe)
resources.description: Stedi sandbox — Aetna subscriber only. Jane Doe / AETNA12345 / DOB 20040404.

resources.name: Eligibility — UnitedHealthcare Subscriber (UHC0000001)
resources.description: Stedi sandbox — UnitedHealthcare subscriber-only test case.

resources.name: Seed Test Data
resources.description: Creates Aetna (Test) payor, plan, John Doe patient (memberId: AETNA9wcSu — no DOB), Dr. Alex Test provider, and an upcoming visit. Safe to run multiple times (upsert).

resources.name: Seed Master Payors
resources.description: Syncs master payor list from Stedi into the MasterPayor table.

resources.name: Seed CMS Rates (2026)
resources.description: Seeds CPTCodeRate records from the 2026 CMS Physician Fee Schedule.

resources.name: Seed ICD-10 Codes
resources.description: Seeds common ICD-10-CM diagnosis codes for all orgs.

resources.name: Stedi Webhook (POST)
resources.description: No JWT auth — Stedi calls this directly. Controller validates STEDI_WEBHOOK_SECRET env var if set.
